'''Fen''' was an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] agent who worked at the [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] in [[Quantill City]], on [[Ando/Legends|Ando]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Ando" />
